---
title: "Tax Forecast Model"
author: "David T. Flynn, PhD"
date: "2026-03-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Library and Data Loading

Basic libraries for analysis. 

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(fpp3)
library(dplyr)
library(urca)
```

Start with the MW CPI data and the tax data.
